title: Hello, GCP
description: Every type inferred from zero annotations – welcome to GCP.

title: String & Escape Sequences
description: String concatenation, escape sequences (\n \t \") — all decoded at parse time.

title: Numeric Tower
description: GCP infers the narrowest numeric type automatically.

title: Curried Functions
description: All Outline functions are curried — GCP infers the full A→B→C chain.

title: Higher-Order Functions
description: Functions that accept or return functions — GCP tracks the full type chain.

title: Recursive Functions
description: GCP handles mutual recursion and infers fixed-point types.

title: Sum Types (ADT)
description: GCP infers the precise ADT variant for every match branch.

title: Entity Types (Product Types)
description: Struct-like entity types with typed fields — GCP infers field access types.

title: Literal Types
description: Literal types pin a field to a fixed constant value — no assignment needed.

title: Pattern Matching + Guards
description: Exhaustive match with guard conditions — GCP infers a unified result type.

title: Arrays & Pipelines
description: Ranges with variables, map/filter/reduce — all inferred end-to-end.

title: ⚡ GCP Inference Showcase
description: Generics, HOFs, ADTs and closures — GCP infers it all with zero annotations.

title: Generic Functions
description: GCP propagates generic type variables through arbitrary call chains.

title: Data Pipeline
description: A realistic data-processing pipeline — GCP tracks types through every stage.
